results.rendered_html:
avasādaka a.
1 Causing to sink, faint, or fail.
2 Causing dejection or fatigue; eṣa śokaḥ parityaktaḥ sarvakāryāvasādakaḥ  Rām. 
3 Exhausting, wearisome, tiresome, fatiguing.
4 Ending, finishing.
